infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Zippy uses your location to show your position on the map and find nearby drivers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Zippy uses your location to track your ride in real time.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Zippy uses your location to show your position on the map and connect you with nearby drivers.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Zippy uses your location to track your ride in real-time even when the app is in the background.
